# VirtualGamePad

> VirtualGamePad lets you use your Android phone as a gamepad for your Windows and Linux PCs.

This website is generated via Hugo, and the source markdown files are accessible via GitHub.

The following rule can be used to access the markdown files:
https://kitswas.github.io/VirtualGamePad/<path>/ -> https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kitswas/VirtualGamePad/refs/heads/main/content/<path>.md

With the index/home page being the only exception:
https://kitswas.github.io/VirtualGamePad/ -> https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kitswas/VirtualGamePad/refs/heads/main/content/_index.md

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://kitswas.github.io/VirtualGamePad/sitemap.xml)
